Exceptional Dental Care in Premium Dental Clinic

Your Smile , Evalated

Experience premium dental care enhanced by advanced technology, where personalized treatments, expert care, and exceptional comfort come together to create a truly elevated experience.

Book an Appointment Call +95 9 940 077 977

Our Services

Comprehensive dental care designed for comfort, confidence, and long-term health - from routine checkups to advanced restorative and cosmetic treatments.

Dental Implants

Permanent solutions for missing teeth - natural-looking, durable, and long-lasting.

IV Sedation Dentistry

Calm, supported visits for patients who want a more relaxed treatment experience.

Cosmetic Dentistry

Smile-enhancing treatments planned around natural aesthetics, balance, and confidence.

3D Dental Scanning

Precise digital imaging that supports clearer planning, better fit, and smoother care.

More Than a Dental Office

We've reimagined the dental experience around comfort, precision, and personal attention. From the moment you step in, you'll feel the difference of a luxury clinic.

Meet Our Team

Real Results. Real Patients.

With glowing Google reviews and strong ties to the Mooresville community, our patients say it best:

Sarah Jenkins

Teeth Whitening

★★★★★

I was nervous about whitening, but the team made me feel so calm. The results are amazing - my smile looks brighter and more natural than I expected. Highly recommend!

Mark Thompson

Dental Implants

★★★★★

The implant process was smoother than I expected. The staff is friendly, the clinic is spotless, and the follow-up care was excellent. I'm thrilled with the result.

Emily Patel

Orthodontics

★★★★★

I was hesitant about orthodontics as an adult, but the team explained everything clearly and made the process painless. My smile is straighter and I feel so much more confident.

Daniel Kim

Root Canal

★★★★★

I was dreading a root canal, but it was surprisingly painless. The dentist was gentle, explained every step, and the recovery was quick. Great care from start to finish.

Sofia Rodriguez

Veneers

★★★★★

My veneers look and feel like my natural teeth. The clinic was clean, the staff was kind, and the results are stunning. I finally feel comfortable smiling in photos.

Priya Shah

Invisalign

★★★★★

Invisalign was the perfect choice for me. The appointments were quick, the aligners were comfortable, and the progress was steady. I love my new smile - it's straight and natural-looking.

Total Dental Care, Tailored for You

We're more than a dental office we're a sanctuary for your smile. Here's what sets us apart:

Bilingual Team

Serving patients with care in both English and Spanish

Advanced Technology

Digital X-rays, 3D scanning, and same-day treatment solutions

Comfort-First Care

Sedation options and a gentle approach for every patient

Experience Our Modern Clini

Discover a welcoming space designed for your comfort, equipped with advanced technology and modern facilities to provide exceptional dental care in a relaxing environment.

Ready for Your Best Smile?

New patients are always welcome. Book your consultation today and experience the D'Lux difference.
